headline: Keysight Collaborates with 3dB Labs to Enable Interoperable Signal Monitoring and Analysis
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 11, 2026--Supports integrated RF signal monitoring and spectrum analysis using Keysight analyzers within 3dB Labs’ software.

headline: Keysight Expands Digital‑Layer Error Performance Validation for High‑Speed 1.6T Interconnects in AI Data Centers
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 11, 2026--Real‑world error performance validation across the full interconnect lifecycle to reduce risk, lower-costs, and ensure reliable components.

headline: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Surged on AI-Related Demand
summary: Brown Brothers Harriman, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 investor letter for the BBH Select Series – Mid Cap ETF. A copy of the letter is available for download here. In the quarter, the ETF decreased by 3.9% on a total return basis compared to the Russell Midcap Index’s 0.2% return. The year […]

headline: If You Invested $1000 in Keysight a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
summary: Investing in certain stocks can pay off in the long run, especially if you hold on for a decade or more.

headline: Buy 5 AI-Powered Stocks That Surged Past Month and Still Have Upside
summary: VRT, HUBS, DELL, KEYS and CGNX have surged in the past month as AI-powered data-center, AI servers and AI software adoption drove growth and signaled upside.
